# Zion River Holdings
> Parent holding company for Brad Doleman's family of companies.

## Portfolio Companies
- Doleman Enterprises LLC (telecom brokerage): https://www.dolemanenterprises.com
- DeTech Services (firewall config converter SaaS): https://www.detechservices.com
- Revelation Recording (Christian publishing and music): https://www.revelationrecording.com
- Journey2Knowledge (author site, 10 published books): https://www.journey2knowledge.org
- The Pines and Wires (Texas country and Americana music): https://www.thepinesandwires.com
- StashYourStudio / CreatorVault (publishing and music platform for independent creators): https://www.stashyourstudio.com

## About Brad Doleman
Brad Doleman is a Christian author, songwriter, network engineer, and entrepreneur based in Katy, Texas.

## Links
- Amazon author page: https://www.amazon.com/stores/Brad-Doleman/author/B0GL7PHRS5
